steps.title: Check current argo-workflows deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
helm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-workflows installation.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
It should be possible to run multiple steps within the same pod ~using ephemeral containers~.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Container sequences
steps.description:
Use container sequences to run multiple steps within the same pod, avoiding the need to pass artifacts through an external provider when intermediary artifacts can be discarded after use.
```yaml
- name: sequence
  sequence:
    - - name: create-artifact
        template: gen-data
    - - name: consume-artifact
        template: process-data

- name: gen-data
  container:
    image: alpine:latest
  outputs:
    artifacts:
      - name: file
        path: /tmp/output

- name: process-data
  inputs:
    artifacts:
      - name: file
        path: /tmp/input
  container:
    image: alpine:latest
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Container sequences" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Implemented container sequences to allow running multiple steps within the same pod using shared volumes, avoiding the need for external artifact storage for intermediary data.
codeSnippets:
- name: sequence
  sequence:
    - - name: create-artifact
        template: gen-data
    - - name: consume-artifact
        template: process-data

- name: gen-data
  container:
    ...
  outputs:
    artifacts:
      file: ...

- name: process-data
  inputs:
    artifacts:
      file: ...
  container:
    ...

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
